01-fork-created.title: Fork a draft branch
01-fork-created.body: The Mina workspace is checked out on draft/mina-q3 from the pull commit; the UI still reads the same git-backed workspace.

02-draft-edits.title: Agent edits the draft
02-draft-edits.body: The scripted agent writes the clinician profile change while the server is on the draft branch, so main remains unchanged.

03-review-diff.title: Review the draft diff
03-review-diff.body: The History panel shows the branch-local agent commit and raw file diff before merge.

03b-drift-detected.title: Detect remote drift
03b-drift-detected.body: Before merge, the persisted mock remote has an out-of-band patient acuity change while the draft adds care region, and plan surfaces the update.

04-merged-main.title: Merge back to main
04-merged-main.body: The fast-forward merge moves main to the agent-authored draft commit, so main history now contains the same provenance.

05-empty-plan-after-merge.title: Prove convergence
05-empty-plan-after-merge.body: After merging the draft, applying main into a persisted Mina mock remote and planning again produces an empty plan.
